data.content: Hardened the console output tap against synchronous createWriteStream failures: ensureStream() now resets cleanly when opening console.log throws, then retries successfully on the next write. Added recovery coverage in console-log-tap tests and reran bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build before merging to main and pushing origin/main at 7e7a0a66ed6c.
